releaseNotes:
1. [Fix] Critical: API format for OpenClaw is restored to standard OpenAI (`openai-completions`), resolving complete connection failures on Gateway hot-reloads.

Enjoy the seamless AI agent experience! (v3.4.1/v3.4.2/v3.4.3 skipped due to CI network errors & bridge unverted syncs)
